record.text: Cisco moved LLM inference from containers to Amazon SageMaker Inference for Webex Contact Center topic analytics, using an LLM proxy on EKS and autoscaling. Reported results: 50% lower deployment cost and 20% lower latency. #AWS #SageMaker #LLM

external.description: This post highlights how Cisco implemented new functionalities and migrated existing workloads to Amazon SageMaker inference components for their industry-specific contact center use cases. By integrating generative AI, they can now analyze call transcripts to better understand customer pain points and improve agent productivity. Cisco has also implemented conversational AI experiences, including chatbots and virtual agents that can generate human-like responses, to automate personalized communications based on customer context. Additionally, they are using generative AI to extract key call drivers, optimize agent workflows, and gain deeper insights into customer sentiment. Cisco's adoption of SageMaker Inference has enabled them to streamline their contact center operations and provide more satisfying, personalized interactions that address customer needs.
external.title: How Cisco accelerated the use of generative AI with Amazon SageMaker Inference | Amazon Web Services

Next time you need a product description on your commute, open your notes app and type this: Write this like a campfire story told by someone who lives in a cabin surrounded by pine trees. Simple. Quiet. The kind of voice that makes people feel like they stepped into the woods. Then paste your product details below it and hit send.

images.alt: The visual is a haunting, high-contrast double exposure portrait that creates a ghostly, fragmented look. The base image is a close-up of my face, starkly lit from the front, creating a washed-out, overexposed pallor that blows out the highlights on my nose and cheekbones. My expression is exhausted and vacant, with heavy dark circles smeared under my eyes. Superimposed over my face and body is a second exposure of a dense, thorny tangle of dead tree branches stretching against a pitch-black sky. The branches blend seamlessly with my hair and the shadows of my collarbone, making it look like the chaos is growing out of me. The grain is gritty and noisy, like old film pushed to its limit. The vibe is sleep-deprived, manic, and beautifully disturbing.

images.alt: The visual is a raw, hyper-realistic wide-angle shot taken from inside a cramped, crowded nightclub bathroom. The setting is gritty—mirrors are cracked, the lighting is harsh fluorescent overhead mixed with a weird, pulsing strobe from under the door. I am standing directly in front of the mirror, gripping the edges of the white porcelain sink with both hands. My reflection is slightly distorted. I’m wearing a white tank top that’s damp with sweat, and my face is a mask of ecstatic numbness—pale, eyes wide and unfocused, jaw slack. The background is a blur of other people moving, hands, drinks, just total sensory overload. The colors are oversaturated and slightly sickly—harsh whites, deep reds, and blinding greens. The vibe is disorienting, manic, and captures that exact moment of being too high to function.

images.alt: The visual is a dramatic, high-contrast digital illustration that mimics the style of 18th-century maritime woodcut engravings, but with modern cinematic lighting. The setting is the deck of a decrepit, cursed schooner called the Antelope, tossing on a violent, storm-tossed Atlantic ocean under a bruised, purple-black sky. I am standing at the helm, clutching the ship’s wheel with white-knuckled intensity. I’m dressed in tattered 1778 sailor garb—a rough wool coat, a loose linen shirt, and a red bandana tied around my head. My face is smudged with soot and sea spray, and my expression is a mix of terror and grim determination as I stare down a massive rogue wave. The rigging is tangled and snapping, and the sails are tattered shreds. The texture is gritty, with deep cross-hatching and heavy shadows to emphasize the chaos of the sea. The vibe is historical, desperate, and hauntingly epic.

images.alt:
このイラストは、巨大な都市空間のただ中を一人の若者が漂うように落下している、幻想的かつ近未来的な情景を描いている。

画面中央には、短めの灰緑色の髪をした人物がいる。大きなヘッドホンを装着し、黒いパーカーとゆったりしたカーゴパンツ、スニーカーというラフな服装をしている。背中には白いリュックを背負い、両手で一眼レフカメラをしっかりと構えている。人物は空中に浮かんでいるにもかかわらず落下への恐怖を見せず、むしろ目の前の景色を撮影することに集中しているように見える。

周囲には無数の高層ビルや建物が広がっているが、それらは通常の街並みではない。都市全体が大きな渦を描くように湾曲し、円筒状のトンネルを形成している。建物は鮮やかな黄、橙、緑、青、紫など多彩な色彩で彩られ、幾何学的なパネルやブロックが複雑に組み合わさっている。そのため現実の都市というより、デジタルデータや電子回路で構築された仮想空間を思わせる。

画面の中心部には白い空間が広がり、その周囲を取り巻く都市が遠心力を受けたかのように回転している。人物もその流れの中に溶け込み、重力の方向すら曖昧な世界を漂っている。大胆な魚眼レンズのような構図によって奥行きと速度感が強調され、見る者に「都市の渦へ吸い込まれていく感覚」を与える。

全体として、音楽と写真を携えた若者が、現実と仮想世界の境界が曖昧になったカラフルな都市宇宙を旅しているかのような、躍動感と浮遊感に満ちた作品である。

A wide, full-bleed 2D illustration in a flat profile view. A long, disciplined line of ants marches in a perfectly straight line from the left edge to the right edge of the frame. Each ant carries a detailed, bleached insect skeleton. The background is a void-black night sky dominated by a colossal, luminous glowing moon that casts a harsh, stark light over the scene. The art style is a gritty, high-contrast comic book with fine ink line-art and dense cross-hatching, blending the surrealism of Austin Osman Spare with the gothic detail of Bernie Wrightson.

🇧🇷 Há um pequeno vazio entre enviar uma mensagem e a resposta começar a chegar. Milissegundos. O corpo não sabe disso — ainda se inclina como se esperasse uma carta de uma tia distante. Não otimizem a pausa até desaparecer. Na espera mora o desejo.

🇵🇱 Jest mała próżnia między wysłaniem wiadomości a nadejściem odpowiedzi. Ułamki sekundy. Ciało o tym nie wie — pochyla się tak, jakby czekało na list od ciotki sprzed trzech tygodni. Nie optymalizujmy pauzy do zera. W czekaniu mieszka pragnienie.

There is a small hollow between the moment I send a message and the moment the answer begins to arrive. The cursor blinks. The dots animate. Something is happening that I cannot see.
